stemHtml: Which of the following statements about crew briefings is correct?

options.a: The take-off briefing is conducted by the PNF (Pilot Not Flying) for the first leg.
options.b: The take-off briefing should be conducted when the aircraft starts moving under its own power.
options.c: Briefings should be conducted during low-workload periods.
options.d: The descent preparation, approach and go-around briefings should typically be completed 20 minutes before reaching the top of descent.
